macro_theme: The dominant theme this week is the strong US jobs report, which has led to expectations of a Federal Reserve rate increase, causing bond yields to rise and the US dollar to strengthen. Additionally, geopolitical tensions in the Middle East and Ukraine are also influencing market sentiment.
